basicPropertyValues.val: Application ontology for representing low-Pt PEMFC cathode catalyst layer experiments, materials, manufacturing conditions, measurements, quantities, and release metadata with conservative alignment to EMMO, ECHO, QUDT, ChEBI, PROV-O, and Dublin Core Terms.
Institute of Energy Technologies (IET), Theory and Computation of Energy Materials (IET-3), Forschungszentrum Juelich GmbH, 52428 Juelich, Germany
Canonical schema module for the H2KG PEMFC catalyst-layer application ontology.
Ontology for representing proton exchange membrane fuel cell materials, components, devices, processes, measurements, and experiments.
H2KG PEMFC Catalyst Layer Application Ontology
H2KG: Ontology for Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Materials, Components, and Experiments

The ontology captures PEMFC catalyst-layer experimental concepts, parameters, properties, measurements, instruments, materials, and related FAIR provenance. It preserves the historic h2kg namespace while improving metadata quality, release readiness, and public documentation.
